message: fix: include missing dist dirs in npm pack

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,11 @@
 ### Fixes
 - Onboarding: resolve CLI entrypoint when running via `npx` so gateway daemon install works without a build step.
 
+## 2026.1.5-3
+
+### Fixes
+- NPM package: include missing runtime dist folders (slack/signal/imessage/tui/wizard/control-ui/daemon) to avoid `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` in Node 25 npx installs.
+
 ## 2026.1.5-2
 
 ### Fixes

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "clawdbot",
-  "version": "2026.1.5-2",
+  "version": "2026.1.5-3",
   "description": "WhatsApp gateway CLI (Baileys web) with Pi RPC agent",
   "type": "module",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
@@ -15,18 +15,25 @@
     "dist/cli/**",
     "dist/commands/**",
     "dist/config/**",
+    "dist/control-ui/**",
     "dist/cron/**",
+    "dist/daemon/**",
     "dist/discord/**",
     "dist/gateway/**",
     "dist/hooks/**",
+    "dist/imessage/**",
     "dist/infra/**",

     "dist/*.js",
